codeReview.summary: The feature adds the missing focused trybuild compile-pass proof for VAL-NS-008. The new fixture covers all approved nested secure shapes and intentionally omits non-essential traits on the plaintext child types, so the contract is satisfied explicitly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Workers consistently fell back from GitNexus detect_changes to git diff/status review because the installed GitNexus CLI in this environment does not expose either detect-changes or detect_changes, even though repo guidance and the rust-library-worker skill expect that command.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff for nested-sensitive-metadata-proof-fix records gitnexus detect-changes --repo appdb and gitnexus detect_changes --repo appdb both exiting 1 before falling back; rust-library-worker SKILL.md step 3 and CLAUDE.md require that fallback when tooling is unavailable.

summary: Reviewed commit f596cf45 and the worker handoff/transcript skeleton for nested-sensitive-metadata-proof-fix. The implementation is appropriately scoped to a new trybuild pass fixture plus harness registration, and it directly proves VAL-NS-008 without introducing unrelated changes.
